suggested_fixes: Consider implementing a custom CUDA kernel that fuses the final Y += A @ Z update, exploiting the rank-16 dimension to reduce memory traffic and launch overhead.
warnings: Uses separate ATen matmul and add for the rank-16 update (A @ (B.T @ X)) instead of fusing Y += A @ Z into a single kernel. This deviates from the preferred cuBLAS + fused rank update path and may be less efficient.
